name: tlc
description: TamperMonkey userscripts for working with Trail Life Connect advancement and attendance

scripts.build: bash -c 'mkdir -p dist; cat <(sed s/DATE/$(date +%Y%m%d)/ header.js) <(npx esbuild --tree-shaking --bundle src/index.ts) > dist/tlc.js'
scripts.watch: nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npx tsgo && npm run build"

author: Stephen Hicks <stephenhicks@gmail.com>
